# factory-v2

> Autonomous research-to-product factory. One binary, one loop.

## What is this?

factory-v2 is a Go binary that autonomously:
1. Discovers arXiv papers and clusters them by problem space
2. Extracts techniques from each paper
3. Finds related GitHub repositories
4. Uses Claude Opus to synthesize a product spec fusing 7 papers
5. Uses Claude Sonnet to build the entire repo in one session
6. Validates quality and pushes to GitHub
7. Audits shipped repos and deletes low-quality ones

## Architecture

Single Go binary with cobra CLI. Uses Postgres for state, Claude CLI for AI, GitHub API for repo management. Runs locally on macOS.

## Commands

- `factory-v2 run` — full autonomous loop
- `factory-v2 build --spec spec.json` — build one spec
- `factory-v2 status` — pipeline status
- `factory-v2 audit` — quality audit all repos

## Key source files

- main.go — CLI and run loop
- internal/discover/ — paper discovery and clustering
- internal/research/ — technique extraction and repo search
- internal/synthesize/ — Claude Opus spec fusion
- internal/build/ — Claude Sonnet build, scaffold, validate, git
- internal/audit/ — quality scoring
- internal/db/ — Postgres state
- internal/report/ — pipeline reporting

## Install

```
go install github.com/timholm/factory-v2@latest
```
